ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-17-2021 Continued To Jun-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-12-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Robert Cowan appeared by zoom for Fred Nelson.

The Court stated that it didn't get a courtesy copy of the proof of publication and that when it tracked it down, the publication didn't say the word "amended". Mr. Cowan stated that he has delivered courtesy copies several times and the Probate Examiners have stated that they have not received them, that he read CRC 7.53(a) and it does not say the word "amended" has to be there, and that a couple of years ago he included the word "amended" and the matter got continued because of the word. Mr. Cowan also stated that the Court has discretion, that his Client is the only beneficiary, that there is no prejudice to any party or any creditor, and that the petition has been published twice. In addition, Mr. Cowan stated that there are no unpaid creditors and urged the Court to grant the petition. The Court read CRC 7.53(a) and noted that the rule does not say what should be said. Mr. Cowan stated that whoever is interested in this estate has the estate name and the dates, and that if the word "amended" needs to be there, it should be in the rule. The Court stated that the statute makes it clear that the document has to be accurately reflected, and that the word "amended" gives anyone the heads up that if they saw the petition, this is a different one. The Court waives the notice defect stating that it does not think it prejudices anyone on the specific facts of this case, and informed Mr. Cowan that he should include the word "amended" going forward. The Amended Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the Court's intent to grant it. Fred Nelson will be appointed as the Administrator with full authority. Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for November 17, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Mr. Cowan that he will need to have either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration on file with the Court one week prior to the hearing date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.
